data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Traders are fully pricing in the Fed's rate cut in September. (Jinshi)

data.title: Jobless claims rise for second week as tariff headwinds intensify
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of initial unemployment claims in the United States increased for the second consecutive week last week, indicating that labor market conditions have weakened amid the intensification of economic headwinds from tariffs. During and after the new crown pandemic, companies generally hoarded workers after struggling to find labor, but the growing uncertainty caused by President Trump’s tariffs has forced some companies to lay off employees. Economists expect the number of initial unemployment claims this month to break through the 2025 range of 205,000 to 243,000, mainly due to the difficulty in adjusting the data for seasonal fluctuations, and similar trends have been seen in recent years. The increase in the number of continuing unemployment claims is consistent with the decline in consumer confidence in the job market. (Jinshi)

data.title: Gate held an AMA on the LAUSDT contract, and CBO Kevin explained the compensation plan in detail
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gate held an English AMA live broadcast on the official X, responding positively to the recent abnormal price of LAUSDT perpetual contracts. Gate Chief Business Officer Kevin Lee publicly explained the incident, the emergency response process and the compensation decision, and answered user questions on the spot.
Kevin said that Gate had quickly activated the risk control mechanism after the incident, and immediately offlined the contract, settled the order and issued an announcement simultaneously to ensure that the information was open and transparent and minimize user losses. He emphasized that the platform did not have any internal manipulation behavior, and announced a detailed compensation plan: retain user profits, do not roll back orders, and the platform will bear the full amount of the position, with a total amount of more than 30 million USDT.
The entire AMA lasted nearly an hour, and users asked questions actively during the live broadcast, covering key issues such as platform responsibility, system stability and compensation details. Kevin promised that Gate will continue to strengthen the technical system and strengthen communication with the community. "We always stand with users and the community and will jointly promote the platform forward."

data.title: Truth Social Submits Bitcoin ETF Application to SEC
data.description: According to PANews, Truth Social, the social media platform owned by U.S. President Donald Trump, has filed an S-1 document with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). The application marks a significant step for the platform in entering the cryptocurrency market. The filing was reported by Cointelegraph on June 5, 2025.

data.title: A whale sold some HYPE tokens for a profit, realizing a profit of $1.2 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the whale address qianbaidu.eth has recently started to sell for profit after purchasing 420,000 HYPE tokens (total value of about 13.4 million US dollars) at an average price of 31.9 US dollars. 
At present, the address has sold 235,000 HYPE (about 8.7 million US dollars) at an average price of 37 US dollars, realizing a profit of about 1.2 million US dollars. The address still holds 185,000 HYPE tokens, currently worth about 6.55 million US dollars.

data.title: U.S. Dollar Index Experiences Sharp Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a sudden drop, falling by 15 points in a short period. The index is currently reported at 98.6.

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Rise to Highest Level Since October
data.description: According to Odaily, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending May 31 reached 247,000. This figure surpasses market expectations of 235,000 and marks the highest level since the week of October 5 last year.

data.title: U.S. Trade Deficit Narrows in April, Beating Expectations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the United States reported a trade deficit of $61.6 billion for April, surpassing expectations of a $70 billion deficit. The previous figure was revised from $140.5 billion to $138.3 billion. This marks the smallest trade deficit since August 2023.

data.title: Truth Social Files S-1 Registration Statement for Bitcoin ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Walter Bloomberg, Trump's social platform Truth Social submitted a Bitcoin ETF S-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Romanian Postal Service Introduces Cryptocurrency Funding Terminals
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Romanian postal service, Poşta Română, has initiated a pilot project to install terminals in its post offices for funding cryptocurrency accounts. This initiative is in collaboration with BTR Exchange, a leading cryptocurrency trading platform in Romania. The first terminal has been operational at Post Office No. 1 in Tulcea, located in eastern Romania, enabling users to deposit cash to fund their accounts on BTR Exchange.

data.title: European Central Bank Highlights Trade Policy Uncertainty Impact on Economy
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the European Central Bank (ECB) has indicated that uncertainty in trade policy is expected to affect investment and exports, with an escalation in trade wars potentially leading to slower economic growth and inflation. Currently, inflation is near the ECB's medium-term target of 2%, and the bank is committed to maintaining inflation at this level.

The ECB has not committed to a specific interest rate path. It forecasts a GDP growth rate of 0.9% for 2025, 1.1% for 2026, and 1.3% for 2027. These projections align with the March expectations for 2025 and 2027 but are slightly lower for 2026, which was previously anticipated to be 1.2%.

Inflation is projected to be 2.0% in 2025, 1.6% in 2026, and 2.0% in 2027. These figures have been adjusted from March forecasts, which were 2.3% for 2025, 1.9% for 2026, and 2.0% for 2027.

data.title: BounceBit adds USD1 CeDeFi yield strategy and launches limited-time Promo Vault
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, BounceBit has added USD1 CeDeFi income strategy, and USD1 stablecoin is supported and issued by World Liberty Financial of the Trump family. To celebrate this cooperation, BounceBit will launch a limited-time promotional vault (Promo Vault) on June 9, providing a 30-day 15% annualized yield, with a limit of US$1 million. At the same time, some participants will have the opportunity to be randomly selected to receive a Trump-inspired T-shirt.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Enhances Treasury Strategy to Boost Financial Transparency
data.description:
According to ShibDaily, the Ethereum Foundation has unveiled a new treasury strategy aimed at improving transparency and structure in resource allocation, as it continues to support Ethereum's decentralized finance (DeFi) ecosystem. In a recent blog post, the Foundation detailed its updated financial policy, which will connect daily expenses and cash needs to its holdings and sales of Ether. This initiative is intended to strengthen the foundation's fiscal stability as it enters what it describes as a crucial 18-month period for the Ethereum network.

On June 4, a director from the foundation mentioned that the organization will regularly reassess its annual operating costs, calculated as a percentage of its treasury, along with its financial runway. These evaluations will take into account market conditions and feedback from the Ethereum community, aiming to align short-term spending with the foundation's broader, long-term vision. Ethereum Foundation Co-Executive Director Hsiao-Wei Wang cautioned that the organization faces a 2.5-year runway before its cash reserves are exhausted, marking the next 18 months as a critical period for strategic resource deployment and expanded support for the Ethereum ecosystem. "This policy reflects our belief that 2025-26 are likely to be pivotal for Ethereum, necessitating enhanced focus on critical deliverables," Wang stated.

In response to increasing scrutiny from the Ethereum community, the Foundation has adopted a more stringent approach to managing its funds, indicating a shift toward greater financial accountability. The updated policy aims not only to stabilize internal operations but also to restore credibility with stakeholders observing how the organization manages its resources. As part of its renewed transparency efforts, the Foundation plans to publish detailed quarterly and annual reports, revealing its asset allocations, investment outcomes, and significant updates. As Ethereum enters a phase of intensified development and strategic funding, the Foundation's renewed emphasis on fiscal discipline could set a standard for how decentralized organizations handle accountability. By aligning its treasury strategy with evolving community expectations, the Ethereum Foundation seeks to establish a more resilient financial base—one that can sustain innovation while reinforcing trust in the broader ecosystem.

data.title: Bybit Launchpool launches CUDIS, earn 4 million CUDIS rewards using CUDIS, BBSOL or USDT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bybit has launched the Launchpool project CUDIS, with a total prize pool of 400 CUDIS. The staking opening time is from 12:00 PM UTC on June 5, 2025 to 12:00 PM UTC on June 12, 2025. Users can now invest CUDIS, BBSOL, and USDT in the fund pool in advance.
This round of Launchpool has three staking pools, details are as follows:
1. CUDIS staking pool
-Total reward: 800,000 CUDIS
-Minimum staking amount: 1,000 CUDIS
-Maximum staking amount: 50,000 CUDIS
2. BBSOL staking pool
-Total reward: 1,200,000 CUDIS
-Minimum staking amount: 0.6 BBSOL
-Maximum staking amount: 60 BBSOL
3. USDT staking pool
-Total reward: 2,000,000 CUDIS
-Minimum staking amount: 100 USDT
-Maximum staking amount: 2,000 USDT

data.title: European Parliament Committee Advances Tech Sovereignty Proposal
data.description:
According to PANews, the European Parliament's Committee on Industry, Research and Energy (ITRE) approved a report on a technology sovereignty proposal on June 3, with plans for a plenary vote in July. The proposal, drafted by pro-Bitcoin Member of Parliament Sarah Knafo, aims to establish a digital ecosystem policy to help Europe compete with the United States and China. Key focuses include removing barriers to private innovation investment, developing energy-efficient computing and blockchain infrastructure, and ensuring digital financial privacy.

Knafo, who has previously opposed the digital euro and advocated for a Bitcoin strategic reserve, noted that the proposal could pass if right-wing parties support it, although left-wing parties are pressuring centrists to block it. European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde rejected the idea of a Bitcoin reserve in January 2025, emphasizing the need for central bank reserves to maintain liquidity and security.

Analysts remain cautious about the proposal's chances of passing, suggesting that significant changes are more likely to be driven by individual member states.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 105,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.13% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 05, 2025, 12:13 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 105,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 105,007.210938 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.13% decrease in 24 hours.
